errors.unexcepted: An unknown error occurred, please try again later, if the error persists, please contact the event organizers.

errors.invalidRecaptchaResponse: Captcha verification failed, please wait before trying again.
errors.notFound: This data is not found, please make sure it exists.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable, please try again later. If the error persists, please contact the event organizer.
errors.eventNotFound: Can't find this event, please confirm and try again.
errors.notRegistered: You have not yet registered for the event, please register first before proceeding.

errors.imATeapot: Your account triggered the security mechanism of the system. You should not be here.

errors.accountRestricted: Your account has been restricted from using this service. Please contact UTFG officials if you have any concerns.
errors.paymentServiceUnavailable: The payment service is temporarily unavailable, please try again later. If the error persists, please contact the event official.
errors.notFursuiter: You have not yet submitted to the Fursuit Roster, please do so and wait for approval before proceeding.
